summary: Completed TASK-179: Created comprehensive usability findings and final recommendations document (docs/ux/usability-findings-recommendations.md). Synthesized all 13 Phase 2 UX deliverables into actionable findings: 3 critical issues (onboarding time risk, canvas performance unvalidated, accessibility untested), 3 high-priority issues (error states underspecified, responsive gaps, undo limits), 5 medium issues, plus 15 prioritized recommendations with launch readiness checklist and success metrics. Updated backlog status to done.
